requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to the Slovak grid must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), specifying requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by each member state. Slovakia's electricity transmission system is operated by SEPS (Slovenská elektrizačná prenosová sústava), and distribution-level grid-connection approvals are coordinated with regional DSOs under ÚRSO (Regulatory Office for Network Industries) oversight. National grid-connection technical requirements may supplement EU-level rules.
summary.zh: 接入斯洛伐克电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。欧盟层面，委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过各成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。斯洛伐克输电系统由SEPS（斯洛伐克电力传输系统）运营，配电层面的并网审批在ÚRSO（网络行业监管办公室）监管下与各地区配电运营商协调。国家并网技术要求可补充欧盟层面规则。
summary.zht: 接入斯洛伐克電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。歐盟層面，委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過各成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。斯洛伐克輸電系統由SEPS（斯洛伐克電力傳輸系統）運營，配電層面的並網審批在ÚRSO（網絡行業監管辦公室）監管下與各地區配電運營商協調。國家並網技術要求可補充歐盟層面規則。

standards_or_laws: SEPS (Slovenská elektrizačná prenosová sústava) grid-connection technical requirements — https://www.sepsas.sk
ÚRSO (Regulatory Office for Network Industries) regulatory framework — https://www.urso.gov.sk

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017）。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017）。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or EU RfG Regulation 2016/631 for Slovak market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA/DAkkS/UKAS), and must satisfy the applicable national grid code and SEPS/DSO connection requirements. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Slovakia; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被斯洛伐克市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或欧盟RfG法规2016/631的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA/DAkkS/UKAS认可）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足适用的国家电网规程及SEPS/DSO并网要求。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在斯洛伐克具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被斯洛伐克市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或歐盟RfG法規2016/631的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA/DAkkS/UKAS認可）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足適用的國家電網規程及SEPS/DSO並網要求。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在斯洛伐克具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通訊協議要求不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive and relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law in Slovakia. SEPS and DSO connection requirements are mandatory for grid connection approval.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Slovak grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and satisfaction of SEPS/DSO grid-connection requirements is required before connecting to the Slovak grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory and coordinate with the relevant Slovak DSO and ÚRSO early in the project development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合斯洛伐克并网要求。在接入斯洛伐克电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新测试，并满足SEPS/DSO并网要求。建议在项目开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室，并与相关斯洛伐克DSO及ÚRSO协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合斯洛伐克並網要求。在接入斯洛伐克電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新測試，並滿足SEPS/DSO並網要求。建議在項目開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室，並與相關斯洛伐克DSO及ÚRSO協調。
